title: Build Cross Platform App
description: Build cross-platform apps, desktop apps, and games with rigid product stacks, design-architecture, workflow, and validation paths instead of open-ended app scaffolding.
body: Use when asked to vibe-code, scaffold, design, or implement a cross-platform app, desktop app, or game where OAL should choose a rigid product stack and design-architecture. Start by reading `references/stack.md`, then `references/design-architecture.md`, then `references/workflow.md`. Keep the stack fixed unless the user explicitly names a conflicting platform constraint. Produce source-backed app structure, product behavior, and validation evidence; return STATUS BLOCKED when required platform credentials, SDKs, or device access are unavailable.
